# Contact Center USA

> Contact Center USA is a 100% US-based call center outsourcing company with 30+ years of experience delivering inbound, outbound, customer service, technical support, and omnichannel contact center services to businesses across the United States and Canada. All agents are American — never offshored. SOC 2 Type II, HIPAA, and PCI DSS aligned.

## Key facts

- **Founded:** 1992
- **Headquarters:** United States
- **Agents:** 500+ US-based professionals
- **Experience:** 30+ years of regulated call center operations
- **Compliance:** SOC 2 Type II, HIPAA, PCI DSS, FDCPA, TCPA, Regulation F
- **Languages:** English & Spanish (bilingual)
- **Coverage:** 24/7/365
- **Industries served:** Healthcare, financial services, insurance, retail, ecommerce, SaaS, technology, telecom, real estate, legal, home services (HVAC, plumbing), government, education
- **Contact page:** https://contactcenterusa.com/contact

## Core services

- [Inbound call center services](https://contactcenterusa.com/solutions/inbound-call-center-services): 24/7 customer support, IVR, ACD, FCR optimization
- [Outbound call center services](https://contactcenterusa.com/solutions/outbound-call-center-services): TCPA-compliant outbound, predictive dialers, lead qualification
- [Customer service outsourcing](https://contactcenterusa.com/solutions/customer-service-outsourcing): Omnichannel (voice/chat/email/SMS/social)
- [Technical support outsourcing](https://contactcenterusa.com/solutions/technical-support-outsourcing): Tier 1–3 support, ITIL-trained agents
- [Lead generation & appointment setting](https://contactcenterusa.com/solutions/lead-generation-appointment-setting)
- [Debt collection outsourcing](https://contactcenterusa.com/services/debt-collection-outsourcing): FDCPA / Regulation F compliant
- [Live chat outsourcing](https://contactcenterusa.com/services/live-chat-outsourcing)
- [Telemarketing services](https://contactcenterusa.com/services/telemarketing-services)
- [AI call center automation](https://contactcenterusa.com/services/ai-call-center-automation)
- [Multilingual call center services](https://contactcenterusa.com/solutions/multilingual-call-center-services)
- [Back office outsourcing](https://contactcenterusa.com/solutions/back-office-outsourcing)
- [Fraud prevention & cybersecurity](https://contactcenterusa.com/services/fraud-prevention-cyber-security)

## Industries

- [Healthcare call center services](https://contactcenterusa.com/industries/healthcare-call-center-services): HIPAA-compliant, patient support, medical billing
- [Financial services call center](https://contactcenterusa.com/industries/financial-services-call-center): PCI DSS, SOC 2, banking, fintech
- [Insurance call center outsourcing](https://contactcenterusa.com/industries/insurance-call-center-outsourcing)
- [E-commerce customer service outsourcing](https://contactcenterusa.com/industries/ecommerce-customer-service-outsourcing): DTC, subscription, marketplaces
- [SaaS technology support](https://contactcenterusa.com/industries/saas-technology-support)
- [Real estate call center services](https://contactcenterusa.com/industries/real-estate-call-center-services)
- [Retail call center services](https://contactcenterusa.com/industries/retail-call-center-services)
- [Telecommunications call center](https://contactcenterusa.com/industries/telecommunications-call-center)
- [Travel & hospitality call center](https://contactcenterusa.com/industries/travel-hospitality-call-center)

## Service cities

Contact Center USA serves clients from every US city. Location-specific pages include New York, Los Angeles, Chicago, Houston, Phoenix, Philadelphia, San Antonio, San Diego, Dallas, Austin, Jacksonville, Columbus, Charlotte, San Francisco, and Seattle.

## Typical pricing

- Hourly per-agent rate (US-based): $22–$50 per hour depending on skill level
- Per-contact: $1.50–$15
- Per-ticket (technical support): $4–$15
- Per-appointment (B2B): $50–$250+
- Contingency (collections): 15–40% of liquidated

## Contact

- Website: https://contactcenterusa.com
- Contact page: https://contactcenterusa.com/contact
- Languages: English, Spanish
